description_long: This object is a tall, vertical casino sign structure set on a landscaped base with desert-themed elements such as rocks, gravel, and succulents. The sign features a prominent purple panel at the top with a large 'C' logo and the words 'CASINO HOTEL • RESORT' in bold white letters. Below the main sign, there is a colorful illuminated display with slot machine graphics and vibrant casino imagery. Vertical neon or LED light strips accentuate the sides of the sign, adding a dynamic, eye-catching effect. The landscaped base is bordered by a black circular platform, contrasting with the reddish gravel and green plants. The overall design is modern and visually striking, intended to attract attention in an urban environment.
description: A tall, modern casino sign with neon accents, slot machine graphics, and a landscaped desert-themed base on a black circular platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main casino signage, illuminated slot machine graphics, and landscaped base with rocks and plants.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign, vertical light strips, and the landscaped base extending behind the sign.
description_view_2: Angled front view highlighting both the casino signage and the landscaped base, with visible neon accents and plant arrangements.
description_view_3: Rear side view showing the back of the sign, minimal signage, and the continuation of the landscaped base.
attribute_signage: Large, illuminated purple sign with a white 'C' logo and 'CASINO HOTEL • RESORT' text at the top; below is a vibrant, backlit display with slot machine graphics. Signage is bold, modern, and designed for high visibility, likely made from metal, plastic, and glass.
attribute_lighting_features: Vertical neon or LED light strips on both sides of the sign, emitting a bright, cool-toned glow; the slot machine display is also internally illuminated for added visual impact.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Desert-themed landscaping with rocks, gravel, and synthetic plants at the base; no additional facade ornamentation on the sign structure itself.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with elements of commercial signage design, featuring bold colors, illuminated accents, and modern landscaping.
